arts.ttl: Former Liverpool star labels Reds man a “revelation” after positive start to 2024/25 campaign
arts.sum: Former Liverpool star Peter Crouch has labelled Ryan Gravenberch a “revelation” after the Dutch star’s impressive start to the 2024/25 campaign in the number six role.
